title: clinopodium × bellantianum
intro: Clinopodium × bellantianum, also known as a hybrid of the Clinopodium genus, is a perennial herb in the mint family (Lamiaceae) that is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, making it useful for treating a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Clinopodium × bellantianum include relief from digestive issues, menstrual cramps, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Clinopodium × bellantianum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in traditional medicine to make salves and ointments for topical application.
